summary: P0 Features Testing Complete: AI Insights, Push Notifications, Email Invites. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All AI Insights UI elements verified working after 15-20s API load time.

integration_issues.issue: Risk gauge shows loading spinner for first 10-15 seconds before data appears. Requires long wait time (~15-20s) for all API data to load.

AI_Insights_APIs.GET /api/safety-events/user-dashboard: PASS - Returns user_id, risk_score, risk_level, threat_assessment
AI_Insights_APIs.GET /api/guardian-ai/{user_id}/risk-scor: PASS - Returns scores object with behavior/location/device/environment/response categories, top_factors array, recommended_action
AI_Insights_APIs.GET /api/guardian-ai/insights/threat-ass: PASS - Returns threat_level and AI narrative summary

Push_Notification_APIs.POST /api/device/register: PASS - Stores device tokens, returns status='registered' or 'updated'
Push_Notification_APIs.POST /api/safety-events/sos with push di: PASS - Returns guardian_notifications array with name/relationship/channels/priority

Email_Invite_APIs.Invite without email (graceful degradati: PASS - Returns email_sent=false when no guardian_email provided
Email_Invite_APIs.SendGrid graceful degradation: PASS - Invite created successfully even without SENDGRID_API_KEY configured, email_sent=false

SOS_Guardian_Notifications.SOS manual trigger returns guardian_noti: PASS - Array contains name, relationship, channels, priority fields
SOS_Guardian_Notifications.SOS trigger_type validation: PASS - All 5 types (manual|voice|button|shake|auto) accepted, invalid type returns 422

AI_Insights_Screen.risk-gauge-card: PASS - Shows score (e.g., '4.1 /10 risk') and risk level badge (MODERATE)
AI_Insights_Screen.risk-factors-card: PASS - Shows 3 top risk factors with descriptions and impact values
AI_Insights_Screen.threat-assessment-card: PASS - Shows HIGH badge with AI narrative text
AI_Insights_Screen.trend-card: PASS - Shows 'Stable and safe' with 7-day trend visualization

critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes correctly implemented in MobileAIInsights.jsx
Risk score API returns all 5 category scores (behavior/location/device/environment/response)
Email service has proper graceful degradation when SendGrid not configured
NotificationService stores notifications in push_notifications table before attempting FCM delivery
SOS endpoint correctly dispatches to guardian network with notification channels
FCM and SendGrid credentials are NOT configured - push/email stored but not actually sent (infrastructure-ready)
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_ prefixed device tokens created during push notification testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 features tested: 1) AI Insights at /m/ai shows risk gauge, 5 category factors, top risk factors, threat assessment, AI recommendation, and trend card. APIs take 15-20s to fully load. 2) Push notifications via NotificationService stores in push_notifications table (FCM not configured so not actually pushed). 3) Email invites via send_guardian_invite_email returns email_sent field (SendGrid not configured so email_sent=false). User ID for testing: 7437a394-74ef-46a2-864f-6add0e7e8e60.
mocked_api_note: FCM push and SendGrid email are INFRASTRUCTURE-READY but NOT CONFIGURED. Data is stored but not actually sent. email_sent=false indicates graceful degradation working correctly.
